description: EXAMPLE golden set for the retrieval eval, using the checked-in fixtures in rag/tests/fixtures/sample_vault (fictional data — safe to commit). Copy to golden.json and replace with questions about YOUR vault. golden.json + config.yaml are gitignored because they carry personal content. 'expected' holds vault-relative source_path values (as returned by rag.search); a question counts as hit@5 if ANY expected path is in the top-5.

questions.question: What architecture does the WSN pipeline project use?
How is the WSN pipeline deployed?
In the WSN pipeline, what happens to incoming emails?
questions.fact: Emails are parsed and stored in the queue.

questions.question: Which note documents Obsidian wikilinks and callout blocks?
questions.fact: wikilinks-callouts.md covers wikilinks, callouts, and embeds.
